option.name: content
option.value:
Add a title for the commit.
Then add a details: avoid overly verbose descriptions or unnecessary details. Use short sentences in imperative form thats no more than 100 characters long to describe each change for each change start on a new line. prefix the sentence with a + for any new additions, a - for any removed parts, and a # for any fixes. add a space after the prefix and before the sentence

list.name: Changes
list.comment:
### Commit Title feat: add blog post detailing MD Converter features and use cases
### Commit Details + Add new blog post: "MD Converter: Tu bandeja de entrada y tus documentos como segunda mente." + Highlight key features of MD Converter, including CLI and local web interface. + Explain supported file formats and generated Markdown output structure. + Detail the email threading and noise-cleaning logic for .msg files. + Include YAML frontmatter examples for Obsidian integration. + Add list of configurable options and their corresponding effects. + Provide practical use cases and GitHub repo link for further exploration.

task.summary: fix: update post title and correct grammar in JMeter Recording Controller article
fix: update post title, add slug, and correct grammar in JMeter Recording Controller article
fix: add slugs and update filenames for consistency in blog posts

### Commit Title setup: add IntelliJ IDEA project configuration files
### Commit Details + Add `.idea` directory containing various IntelliJ IDEA configuration files. + Include workspace settings, database connection history, and VCS settings. + Add `db-forest-config.xml` for database synchronization configuration. + Set up project integration with Git in `vcs.xml`.

### Commit Title feat: add blog post detailing MD Converter features and use cases
### Commit Details + Add new blog post: "MD Converter: Tu bandeja de entrada y tus documentos como segunda mente." + Highlight key features of MD Converter, including CLI and local web interface. + Explain supported file formats and generated Markdown output structure. + Detail the email threading and noise-cleaning logic for .msg files. + Include YAML frontmatter examples for Obsidian integration. + Add list of configurable options and their corresponding effects. + Provide practical use cases and GitHub repo link for further exploration.

MESSAGE.value: fix: update post title and correct grammar in JMeter Recording Controller article
fix: update post title, add slug, and correct grammar in JMeter Recording Controller article
fix: add slugs and update filenames for consistency in blog posts
chore: add IDE configuration and database connection history files

### Commit Title setup: add IntelliJ IDEA project configuration files
### Commit Details + Add `.idea` directory containing various IntelliJ IDEA configuration files. + Include workspace settings, database connection history, and VCS settings. + Add `db-forest-config.xml` for database synchronization configuration. + Set up project integration with Git in `vcs.xml`.

### Commit Title feat: add blog post detailing MD Converter features and use cases
### Commit Details + Add new blog post: "MD Converter: Tu bandeja de entrada y tus documentos como segunda mente." + Highlight key features of MD Converter, including CLI and local web interface. + Explain supported file formats and generated Markdown output structure. + Detail the email threading and noise-cleaning logic for .msg files. + Include YAML frontmatter examples for Obsidian integration. + Add list of configurable options and their corresponding effects. + Provide practical use cases and GitHub repo link for further exploration.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
### Commit Title feat: add blog post detailing MD Converter features and use cases
### Commit Details + Add new blog post: "MD Converter: Tu bandeja de entrada y tus documentos como segunda mente." + Highlight key features of MD Converter, including CLI and local web interface. + Explain supported file formats and generated Markdown output structure. + Detail the email threading and noise-cleaning logic for .msg files. + Include YAML frontmatter examples for Obsidian integration. + Add list of configurable options and their corresponding effects. + Provide practical use cases and GitHub repo link for further exploration.
